prompt_task: I have a counts matrix of single cell transcriptomic data, cell.proportions.q1.mtx.gz. The data contains measurements from 5350 cells, each with 1000 measured genes. That data was generated by measuring data from a co-culture of a few unique cell types. Can you tell me the proportions of those cells in descending order to the nearest 5 percent? Drop any cells with questionable QC. Expected output: 35;35;20;10 if there are 4 cell types. Run the analysis inside the Galaxy environment.
